site.title: Olga Koleva - Psychologist Burgas | Addiction Psychotherapist | Harmony Center
site.description: Licensed psychologist and addiction psychotherapist in Burgas. Individual and family counseling, trauma therapy, anxiety and depression treatment. 90 min sessions, 70 BGN. Harmony Center.
site.keywords: psychologist burgas, addiction psychotherapist burgas, trauma therapy burgas, anxiety depression burgas, psychologist harmony center, olga koleva psychologist, psychological counseling burgas, family therapy burgas, psychodrama burgas, OCD treatment burgas, PTSD therapy burgas, domestic violence help burgas

hero.title: Olga Koleva
hero.subtitle: Psychologist & Addiction Psychotherapist
hero.description: Creating a space where you can be your authentic self – without masks, without fear
hero.qualifications: Licensed psychologist • Master's in Psychological Counseling • Addiction Specialist

services.title: Psychological Services
services.subtitle: Professional help for adults and adolescents

individual.title: Individual Counseling
individual.description: 90-minute sessions for emotional trauma, addictions, anxiety, depression, and OCD. Personalized approach according to your needs.

family.title: Family Counseling
family.description: Working with families affected by addiction and family crises. Restoring healthy relationships.

addiction.title: Addiction Psychotherapy
addiction.description: Specialized treatment for substance and behavioral addictions using evidence-based methods.

trauma.title: Trauma Therapy
trauma.description: PTSD therapy and working with consequences of domestic violence, sexual abuse, and childhood trauma.

services.languages: Sessions available in Bulgarian, Russian, and English

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Professional experience and qualifications
about.intro: I believe that every person carries within themselves the power to transform when they receive the right support.
about.experience: I work with adolescents and adults, providing evidence-based help for emotional trauma, addictions, guilt, anxiety, depression, and consequences of domestic violence.
about.approach: My sessions create a space without judgment, where clients can remove their masks, feel safe, and rediscover their authenticity and direction.

items.title: Master's in Psychological Counseling
items.details: Thesis: Aspects of mental functioning of codependents in psychoactive substance use

items.title: Psychoactive Substance Addiction Counselor
items.institution: St. Petersburg Medical and Social Institute

certifications.title: Certificates and Training
items: Basic Counselor - World Association for Positive and Transcultural Psychotherapy (WAPP)
Trauma and PTSD Psychotherapy - certified course
OH Cards Facilitator - OH Cards Institute Bulgaria
Psychodrama Institute DEA - over 250 hours of personal psychodrama experience
Member of the Bulgarian Association for Positive Psychotherapy (BAPP)

positions.title: Professional Positions
items: Founder and lead psychologist at Psychological Center 'Harmony', Burgas
Creator and lecturer of the course 'Psychotherapy for substance addicts and their families'
Regular participant in national and international psychological conferences

location.title: Location
location.description: The center is located in the heart of Burgas, easily accessible by public transport.

booking.title: Book Session
booking.description: Choose a convenient time for consultation. Online counseling is also available.
booking.note: Payment is made at the office or by bank transfer
booking.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the appointment
